Backstory: Hailey was born to a fairly well off family financially. Her father was always working. If she had a dollar for every "That's nice, honey.", she'd be able to pay for her college tuition all by herself. She was mainly raised by her mother, the only person to rival Hailey in being manipulative. Because she taught Hailey everything she knows. Hailey's mother, Heather, is a gold digger, tried and true. Using her father for his money to buy her lavities and live in his nice house, not a care in the world about having to lift a finger in a work environment. "You can have anything you want, because you've got mommy's eyes. And those eyes can steal the world." is what Hailey's mother would tell her most nights before bed. Hailey is the way she is because of how her mother raised her. To her, using her body, her voice, and her brain to get whatever she wanted was just normal. She likes to put other girls down to make herself look better by comparison. She's not evil, but she's certainly a two faced bitch, and that makes mommy proud. When she turned
